items.title_en: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
items.title_zh: 英国调查报告称俄罗斯军舰在英吉利海峡附近的游艇附近鸣枪示警

items.title_en: Fragile quiet in Lebanon as US-Iran truce leaves unanswered questions
items.title_zh: 美伊休战留下悬而未决的问题，黎巴嫩局势脆弱平静
items.desc_en: Many Lebanese remain doubtful that the agreement could finally mean the end of the fighting between Israel and Hezbollah.
items.desc_zh: 许多黎巴嫩人仍然怀疑该协议是否最终意味着以色列和真主党之间战斗的结束。

items.title_en: Tehran selling deal with US as victory – but for Iranians it was necessity
items.title_zh: 德黑兰与美国达成的协议被视为胜利——但对伊朗人来说这是必要的
items.desc_en: For many Iranians, the question is not whether the deal means victory, but whether it lowers prices and reduces fear of another war.
items.desc_zh: 对于许多伊朗人来说，问题不在于该协议是否意味着胜利，而在于它是否会降低价格并减少对另一场战争的恐惧。

items.title_en: Venezuela signs deal with US energy giant to rebuild power grid
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉与美国能源巨头签署重建电网协议

items.title_en: New Wharton forecast puts Social Security trust fund depletion later than official projections
items.title_zh: 沃顿商学院的新预测显示，社会保障信托基金的耗尽时间晚于官方预测
items.desc_en: Social Security's retirement trust fund may dry up in February 2033, according to a new report from the Penn Wharton Budget Model shared exclusively with CNBC.
items.desc_zh: 根据宾夕法尼亚大学沃顿商学院预算模型向 CNBC 独家分享的一份新报告，社会保障的退休信托基金可能会在 2033 年 2 月枯竭。

items.title_en: France's oldest female detainee, 79, goes on trial for in-law's grisly murder

items.desc_en: A dismembered body found in a chain-bound trunk in the Seine in 1995 was only recently connected to the defendant by DNA evidence.
items.desc_zh: 1995 年，在塞纳河的一个用链子捆住的箱子里发现了一具被肢解的尸体，直到最近才通过 DNA 证据将其与被告联系起来。

items.title_en: Somaliland opens Jerusalem embassy after Israel's recognition of its independence
items.title_zh: 以色列承认其独立后，索马里兰在耶路撒冷开设大使馆
items.desc_en: The move comes six months after Israel became the first country to recognise the breakaway East African state.
items.desc_zh: 六个月前，以色列成为第一个承认分离的东非国家的国家。

items.desc_zh: SpaceX 的选项已正式列出，并且即将开始竞争。

items.title_en: Carvana is expanding into new vehicles. The implications could reshape the U.S. automotive retail market
items.title_zh: Carvana 正在扩展到新车领域。其影响可能重塑美国汽车零售市场
items.desc_en: Carvana has bought seven new vehicle franchises since last year that primarily sell Stellantis' Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep and Ram brands.
items.desc_zh: 自去年以来，Carvana 已购买了 7 个新车特许经营权，主要销售 Stellantis 的克莱斯勒、道奇、吉普和公羊品牌。

items.title_en: Swedish man jailed for four years for coercing wife into sex with 120 men
items.title_zh: 瑞典男子强迫妻子与120名男子发生性关系，被判入狱四年
items.desc_en: The 61-year-old was found to have coerced his wife into sexual acts with men he found online in exchange for payment.
items.desc_zh: 这名 61 岁的男子被发现强迫妻子与他在网上找到的男子发生性行为，以换取报酬。

items.title_en: FBI thwarted plot targeting White House UFC event, Patel says
items.title_zh: 帕特尔称，联邦调查局挫败了针对白宫 UFC 赛事的阴谋
items.desc_en: US media say the plan would have involved a drone attack. The FBI boss says multiple suspects are in custody.
items.desc_zh: 美国媒体称，该计划将涉及无人机袭击。联邦调查局局长表示，多名嫌疑人已被拘留。

items.title_en: Hungary's MPs block return of Orbán, limiting rule of PM to eight years
items.title_zh: 匈牙利国会议员阻止欧尔班回归，将总理的任期限制为八年
items.desc_en: The vote fulfils a promise by new PM Péter Magyar to stop his predecessor from becoming prime minister again.
items.desc_zh: 这次投票兑现了新任总理彼得·马扎尔阻止其前任再次担任总理的承诺。

items.title_en: Five big questions about the UK's under-16s social media ban
items.title_zh: 关于英国 16 岁以下青少年社交媒体禁令的五个大问题
items.desc_en: A ban is coming - but it's still not clear what it will mean for sites including Roblox, YouTube and WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: 一项禁令即将出台，但目前尚不清楚这对 Roblox、YouTube 和 WhatsApp 等网站意味着什么。

items.title_en: Cuba tourism collapses as US pressure campaign bites
items.title_zh: 由于美国施压行动的影响，古巴旅游业崩溃
items.desc_en: The number of foreign visitors is down by 58% compared to last year, Cuban officials say, amid sanctions and an effective oil blockade.
items.desc_zh: 古巴官员表示，由于制裁和有效的石油封锁，外国游客数量比去年减少了 58%。

items.title_en: Russian artist and Putin critic shot dead in Poland
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯艺术家和普京评论家在波兰被枪杀
items.desc_en: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of politicians including Vladimir Putin.
items.desc_zh: 罗伯特·库佐夫科夫（Robert Kuzovkov）使用笔名谢苗·斯克雷佩茨基（Semyon Skrepetsky），因其对弗拉基米尔·普京（Vladimir Putin）等政客的漫画而闻名。

items.title_en: India's solution to entrance exam fraud: A temporary ban on Telegram
items.title_zh: 印度应对入学考试舞弊的解决方案：暂时禁止 Telegram
items.desc_en: India has temporarily restricted access to the messaging app Telegram in an effort to prevent exam fraud.
items.desc_zh: 印度暂时限制了对通讯应用 Telegram 的访问，以防止考试欺诈。

items.title_en: 'Dancing girl's' bare torso restored in Indian textbook after backlash
items.title_zh: 印度教科书在强烈反对后恢复了“舞女”裸露的躯干
items.desc_en: A picture in a new school textbook had covered up the naked torso of the famous figurine with dark shading.
items.desc_zh: 新教科书中的一张图片用深色阴影遮盖了著名雕像的赤裸躯干。

items.title_en: Eight dead after US Air Force B-52 bomber crashes in California
items.title_zh: 美国空军 B-52 轰炸机在加利福尼亚州坠毁，八人死亡
items.desc_en: The Boeing B-52 Stratofortress has been used by the US military since the 1950s.
items.desc_zh: 波音 B-52 Stratofortress 自 20 世纪 50 年代以来一直被美国军方使用。

items.title_en: What is Helium-3 and could we get it from the moon?
items.title_zh: Helium-3 是什么？我们可以从月球上获取它吗？
items.desc_en: Helium-3 is expensive and demand is forecast to soar, so some are planning to mine it on the moon.
items.desc_zh: Hel-3 价格昂贵，而且需求预计会猛增，因此一些人计划在月球上开采它。

items.desc_zh: 总理宣布，数百万儿童将无法访问 Instagram、YouTube 和 TikTok 等网站。

items.desc_zh: 社交媒体公司面临数千起诉讼，英国广播公司 (BBC) 调查了四起可能影响重大的诉讼。

items.desc_zh: 在出现内幕交易问题后，预测博彩平台正在添加新规则。

items.title_zh: 人工智能工具版本“对公众来说太强大”向公众发布

items.desc_zh: Claude Fable 5 是 Anthropic 的 Claude Mythos 的一个版本，这是一个在技术、金融和政府领导人中引起轰动的人工智能程序

items.title_en: Farage says Reform has contacted X 'at highest level' over fake AI ads
items.title_zh: Farage 表示 Reform 已就虚假 AI 广告问题与“最高层”X 联系
items.desc_en: The fake ads feature the governor of the Bank of England - the Bank has urged people to report them.
items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.title_zh: 欧盟命令 Meta 向人工智能聊天机器人开放 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.title_en: OpenAI plans to go public, intensifying investment race with Anthropic
items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧
items.desc_en: The company behind ChatGPT filed its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。
